competitions.summary: This is the official megathread. All comments are set to display by newest . While the event is happening, make sure to keep the megathread open and constantly refreshed to view and and participate in live discussion from the reddit community. Event Time: February 28, 2026 8:00 PM Local Vienna, Austria Time 2:00 PM EST Eastern Standard Time 11:00 AM PST Pacific Standard Time 7:00 PM UTC Coordinated Universal Time 8:00 PM CET Central European Time 11:00 PM GST Gulf Standard Time Purchase PPV : https://live.evwsports.com/ Preliminary Matches These matches will be livestreamed for free on Youtube Carolina “The Flame” Pettersson vs Esra Kiraz Luka Tsinadze vs Eli Saidov Curtis “Porkchop” Cameron vs Peter Čeleš Main Card Matches Buy the PPV to watch these matches (order of matches might change): Nugo “Bulldog” Chikadze vs Bogdan “Specialist” Stoica Vladislavs “Vlad The Destroyer” Krasovskis vs Alexander “Manifestor” Teliatnik Efe Kömek vs Tarkhan Muzaffarov Matt "Wild Horse" Mask vs Davit Arabuli Serhii “Kalina” Kalinichenko vs Yordan Tsonev Fia Reisek vs Brigitta Ivanfi Kamil “The Golden Dragon ”Jablonski vs Michael "Monster" Todd Oleg Petrenko vs Todd "Toddzilla" Hutchings (Right Arm Light Heavyweight Title) Vitaly Laletin vs Devon "No Limits" Larratt (Left Arm Super Heavyweight Title) https://preview.redd.it/t25phprlxulg1.png?width=1440&format=png&auto=webp&s=516e66b014e7f16b5ecb612f11fbd10cafdb4efc submitted by /u/minhale [link] [comments]
